title: The Kelly Criterion
author: From: Fortune's Formula
content: The mathematical strategy for determining the optimal size of a series of bets to maximize long-term growth while minimizing ruin.

title: Asymmetric Risk
author: From: Skin in the Game
content: Seek positions where the downside is known and limited, but the upside is unknown and potentially massive.

title: Fragility vs. Antifragility
author: From: Antifragile
content: Fragile things break under stress; robust things resist; antifragile things improve. Your strategy should benefit from the chaos of the market.

title: Optionality
author: From: The Black Swan
content: Having options is the best defense against an uncertain future. Never commit 100% of your resources to a single, inflexible path.

title: The Narrative Fallacy
author: From: The Black Swan
content: We create stories to explain the past, but the past was mostly random. Do not let 'the story' of a stock cloud your objective analysis.
